dict.string: This app needs to access your camera to take pictures so that you can shoot and upload videos or pictures. All recorded content will be securely stored on your personal device and will only be uploaded or shared with your explicit consent.

This app needs to access your location information in order to provide more personalized services. We promise that your location data will be strictly confidential and used only with your authorization to enhance the user experience.
This app needs to access your microphone to record audio so that you can have a voice chat. We will only use or access the content you have recorded with your explicit consent.

This app needs to access your album so that you can select and upload videos or avatars. All selected files will only be used for the purposes you have authorized and will be securely stored on your device or shared with your explicit consent.
